calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order For Relief Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 473 Or Alternatively For Finding The Mar-26-10 Memo Of Costs Seeking Post-Judgment Attorneys Fees Voide On The Grounds Of Fraud
Off Calendar Oct-22-2010 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion Adn Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Mark L. Mosley, Esq., for plaintiff in intervention and moving party: JOHN BOCCARDO LIVING TRUST DATED FEB-14-95, JON ROBERS LIVING TRUST DATED MAR-07-95
Douglas B. Provencher, Esq., for Judgment Creditor and opposing party: Creditors Trade Association, Inc.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. Plaintiffs In Intervention Motion For Preliminary Injunction is granted as to Judgment Creditor, Creditors Trade Association, Inc. as the Court appointed Receiver Richard B. Cole are enjoined from taking any further steps to effectuate the sale of California Liquor License Number 42791, taking any steps to transfer title to or ownership of that Liquor License, or taking any other action with respect to that Liquor License.
Modification: to include language regarding the steps to be taken if moving party has another buyer. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Hearing On Order To Show Cause (Liquor License)
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Douglas B. Provencher, Esq., for Judgment Creditor and moving party: Creditors Trade Association, Inc.
Mark L. Mosley, Esq., for plaintiff in intervention and opposing party: JOHN BOCCARDO LIVING TRUST DATED FEB-14-95, JON ROBERS LIVING TRUST DATED MAR-07-95

Hearing On Order To Show Cause. Preliminary injunction is granted. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Ex Parte Application For Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Mark L. Mosley, Esq., for intervenor and moving party: John Boccardo Living Trust (2/14/95) and John Humbert Boccardo Living Trust Dated (3/7/95)
No appearance stated by defendant's attorney.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Intervenor John Boccardo Living Trust (2/14/95) and John Humbert Boccardo Living Trust Dated (3/7/95)'s Ex Parte Application For Temporary Restraining Order is GRANTED. The Court finds that the applicant has demonstrated good cause to issue a Temporary Restraining Order pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 527(c)(1). Order will be submitted by the moving party. Judge: MONICA A. WILEY, not reported.

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
